creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May  3 08:48:42 2014
New Revision: 352892
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352892
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352892/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Use single space after WWW:
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189260
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/Makefile
  head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:37 2014	(r352891)
+++ head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:42 2014	(r352892)
@@ -8,9 +8,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Send and receive IPv4 and IPv6 multicast messages
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-IO-Interface>=1.01:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-IO-Interface \
 		p5-IO-Socket-INET6>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-IO-Socket-INET6 \
 		p5-Socket-Multicast6>=0.01:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-Socket-Multicast6 \

Modified: head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:48:37 2014	(r352891)
+++ head/net/p5-IO-Socket-Multicast6/pkg-descr	Sat May  3 08:48:42 2014	(r352892)
@@ -7,4 +7,4 @@ This module uses the same API as IO::Soc
 for IPv6 (IPv4 is still supported). Unlike IO::Socket::Multicast, this is a
 pure-perl module.
 
-WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/IO-Socket-Multicast6/
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/IO-Socket-Multicast6/
